[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101110010 5
1 111111110 8
2 101111010 6
3 111111110 8
4 111111011 8
5 110011011 6
6 111111011 8
7 111011011 7

01 10 111111010 7
12 21 111111110 8 match 1 3
23 32 111111110 8 match 1 3
34 43 110111010 6
45 54 111011011 7 match 7
56 65 111011001 6
67 76 111111011 8 match 4 6
70 07 111101010 6

13 31 101111010 6 match 2
24 42 111111110 8 match 1 3
35 53 111111011 8 match 4 6
46 64 110011011 6 match 5
57 75 111111011 8 match 4 6

71 17 111111010 7

25 52 111111101 8
36 63 100111011 6
47 74 111101010 6
50 05 111011011 7 match 7
61 16 101111011 7
72 27 111111110 8 match 1 3
